Functional marker expression in tumor cells in the different neighborhoods

Tumor cells in stromal areas have less oxidative stress markers (GCLC, NQO1, TXNRD1) and proliferation markers (Ki67, GLUT1)

Proliferating cancer cells and Cancer cells with high TXNRD1 expression reside especially in neighborhoods rich in CD4+T-cells and CD8+T-cells

Except Tumor Rich neighborhoods, cancer cells with high GCLC and NQO1 expression reside in beighborhood rich in CD4+T-cells.

For 3 different tumor rich neighborhoods, Tumor_NQO1+ and Tumor_GCLC+VIM+ Rich areas have less GLUT1 and Ki67
